properties.displayName: Nessus - Spike in Unauthorized Web UI Requests
properties.description: Detects a spike in 403 Forbidden responses to the Nessus web UI from a single source IP. May indicate an unauthenticated user probing API endpoints or attempting unauthorized access.
properties.query:
NessusLogs
| where LogType == "WebAccess" and WebStatusCode == 403
| summarize ForbiddenCount=count(), Paths=make_set(WebUriPath, 20) by WebSrcIP, bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| where ForbiddenCount >= 10
| extend IPCustomEntity = WebSrcIP
